article.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborator with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his collaborations with prominent industry figures and his distinctive sample pack release.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his work with prominent figures in the music industry.
He has collaborated with artists such as DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer, establishing a notable presence in the electronic music scene.
Noizekid released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation, which includes his samples, loops, and drums used in various productions.
His work is characterized by a fusion of moombahton and dancehall elements, contributing to the evolving landscape of Latin electronic music.
